calendar.matters:
Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER MARK A. WALTHER Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration Award:
APPEAR: Jason E. Turner, Esq. 650/289-1400 for petitioner & moving party; Faredah S. Totah, 826-3007 respondent & opposing party in pro per w/ son Raymond Totah, translator.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD GRANTED. LOSAVIO DECLARATION SUFFICIENT). Court will not allow attorneys fees or costs. Order & judgment signed in open court. (302/AJR/AS(EX)) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-23-2002 Continued To Nov-13-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER MARK A. WALTHER Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration Award:
APPEAR: Jason E. Turner, Esq. 650/289-1400 for petitioner & moving party; Faredah Totah 826-3007, respondent & opposing party in pro per with son Raymond Totah (both sworn & examined).
RULING: Argued and the Court continues the matter to 11/13/02. Pltf to file detailed declaration from arbitrator on 11/01; responding declaration due 11/06. (302/AJR/AS(EX)) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-12-2002 Continued To Oct-01-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Jason E. Turner, Esq. 650/289-1400 for petitioner & moving party; Faredah Totah, 826-3007 respondent & opposing party in pro per w/ interpreter, son Raymond Totah.
RULING: The Court continues this matter to 10/01/02. Deft to file opposition by 09/23; pltf to file reply by 09/26. In addition, under case #501461, Faredah Totah's "petition to vacate arbitration award and for rehearing" set for 12/09/02 in dept. 301 is to now be heard on 10/01/02 in dept. 302. (AJR/ju)
